title: Ranakpur Jain Temple
tagline: Ranakpur Jain Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Ranakpur Jain temple or Chaturmukha Dharana Vihara is a Śvētāmbara Jain temple at Ranakpur dedicated to Tirthankara Rishabhanatha.
overview.description: Ranakpur Jain temple or Chaturmukha Dharana Vihara is a Śvētāmbara Jain temple at Ranakpur dedicated to Tirthankara Rishabhanatha. The temple is located in the village of Ranakpur near Sadri in the Pali district of Rajasthan. It is a major pilgrimage place for the Śvetāmbara community. Seth Dhanna/Dharna Shah, a local Jain businessperson, started construction of the temple in the 15th century after a divine vision.

topPlaces.name: Ranakpur
topPlaces.description: Ranakpur is a village located in Desuri tehsil near Pali city in the Pali district of Rajasthan in western India. The nearest Municipality is Sadri.

topPlaces.name: Sadri
topPlaces.description: Sadri is a municipality in the Pali district of Rajasthan, India. Before it was formally founded, there were various settlements in the area which fell under the Jagir of the Rajput clan Sindhal Rathore who still reside in the central part of the Municipality at a location called Sindhalo ka Rawla.

topPlaces.name: Parshuram Mahadev Temple
topPlaces.description: Parshuram Mahadev Temple is a cave Shiva temple located at border of Pali district and Rajsamand district of Rajasthan state in India. The main cave temple comes in Rajsamand district, whereas Kund Dham comes in Desuri Tehsil of Pali district.

topPlaces.name: Mundara
topPlaces.description: Mundara is a village located in the Bali tehsil of Pali district of Rajasthan state.

items.note: Ranakpur is a village located in Desuri tehsil near Pali city in the Pali district of Rajasthan in western India. The nearest Municipality is Sadri.

Sadri is a municipality in the Pali district of Rajasthan, India. Before it was formally founded, there were various settlements in the area which fell under the Jagir of the Rajput clan Sindhal Rathore who still reside in the central part of the Municipality at a location called Sindhalo ka Rawla.

Parshuram Mahadev Temple is a cave Shiva temple located at border of Pali district and Rajsamand district of Rajasthan state in India. The main cave temple comes in Rajsamand district, whereas Kund Dham comes in Desuri Tehsil of Pali district.
Mundara is a village located in the Bali tehsil of Pali district of Rajasthan state.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ranakpur Jain Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ranakpur Jain Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ranakpur Jain Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Maharana Pratap Airport, Udaipur (73 km) and the nearest railway station is Udaipur City (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ranakpur Jain Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ranakpur Jain Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ranakpur Jain Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ranakpur Jain Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ranakpur Jain Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ranakpur, Sadri, Parshuram Mahadev Temple, Mundara.
